label: Column Data Type
description: Data types a template column can be validated as.

terms.label: String
terms.description: Free-text string value.

terms.label: Number
terms.description: Any numeric value (integer or decimal).

terms.label: Integer
terms.description: Whole number only.

terms.label: Boolean
terms.description: True/false value.

terms.label: Date
terms.description: Date value (YYYY-MM-DD).

terms.label: Date + Time
terms.description: Date and time value (ISO 8601).

terms.label: Email
terms.description: Valid email address.

terms.label: URL
terms.description: Valid URL.

terms.label: Controlled Value (LOV)
terms.description: Value must be in the column's linked list of values (LOV terminology).

terms.label: Conditional Required
terms.description: Target column is required when source column equals condition_value.

terms.label: Conditional Forbidden
terms.description: Target column must be empty when source column equals condition_value.

terms.label: Mutual Exclusion
terms.description: Source and target columns cannot both have values.

terms.label: Dependency
terms.description: Source column requires target column to also be present.

terms.label: Regex Match
terms.description: Source column value must match the given regex pattern.

terms.label: Range Check
terms.description: Source column numeric value must be within min/max bounds.

label: Validation Failure Severity
description: Severity level of a validation failure.

terms.label: Error
terms.description: Hard validation failure — data is invalid and must be corrected.

terms.label: Warning
terms.description: Soft failure — data is unusual but not necessarily wrong.

terms.label: Info
terms.description: Informational note — no action required.

label: Validation Run Status
description: Lifecycle status of a validation run.

terms.label: Pending
terms.description: Run created, validation not yet started.

terms.label: Running
terms.description: Validation in progress.

terms.label: Complete
terms.description: Validation finished successfully.

terms.label: Failed
terms.description: Validation aborted due to a system error.

label: Spreadsheet Format
description: Source spreadsheet format type for validation templates.

terms.label: C02
terms.description: C02 format: row 1 = headers, rows 2+ = data, optional Validation Sheet tab for LOV.

terms.label: Vendor
terms.description: Vendor format: rows 1-11 = field metadata, columns B+ = fields, LoV tab, meta sheets.
